name: A.P. Moller Maersk A/S
lede: Maersk runs six centers across five Indian cities. Kanchipuram, Chennai, Bengaluru, Mumbai and Pune, covering CoE and GCC/GIC, built over 23 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Maersk office in India. We map six, across five cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: A.P. Moller Maersk A/S GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Maersk runs 6 verified centers across 5 Indian cities (Kanchipuram, Chennai, Bengaluru, Mumbai, Pune), covering CoE and GCC/GIC. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Maersk's India footprint covers Kanchipuram, Chennai, Bengaluru, Mumbai and Pune, spanning CoE and GCC/GIC. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 89 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: Maersk operates 6 active centers in India.

faq.a: Maersk runs CoE and 1 additional center types centers in India.

faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Maersk's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.
